item.title:
pgal10: paul galvin @pgal10 · 1min THREE UP .
Our three-up tee is here @dunnesstores A shout-out to the FRC.
CAID check sh
item.description:
paul galvin @pgal10 · 1min THREE UP .
Our three-up tee is here @dunnesstores A shout-out to the FRC.
CAID check shirt and THREE-UP joggers in too, just in time for Championship .
Good luck to all teams this weekend .
https:// dunnesstores.com/paul-galvin/vi ew-all … 14

item.title: 7AFL: Maurice Brosnan reposteó 7AFL @7AFL · 4h "I just want to shout out the Dawson family, and Elijah Hollands last night ...
item.description:
Maurice Brosnan reposteó 7AFL @7AFL · 4h "I just want to shout out the Dawson family, and Elijah Hollands last night ... hopefully the AFL community wraps their arms around them.
"Speak to your mates, put your arm around your loved ones. You never know who might need it."
- Bailey Smith 61 199 2 mil 87 mil

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 22min INTERVIEW: Developed by @clgNaFianna , Conor McHugh is delighted to be still representing
item.description:
The GAA @officialgaa · 22min INTERVIEW: Developed by @clgNaFianna , Conor McHugh is delighted to be still representing @DubGAAOfficial in the @gaaleinster SHC #GAA
https:// soundcloud.com/officialgaa/ga a-ie-interview-dublin-1 … 1 956

item.title: pgal10: paul galvin @pgal10 · 26min Was taken by McBrien v London. Huge appetite & aptitude for work off the ball & gears to cov
item.description: paul galvin @pgal10 · 26min Was taken by McBrien v London. Huge appetite & aptitude for work off the ball & gears to cover ground . 2 turnovers for inside first 3 mins, several more after that. But the piece I like the most , 12 possessions in the entire game, approx 4 solos in an era where soloing needs to Cita paul galvin @pgal10 · 8h Enjoyed the new analysis show on @GAAPlusOfficial w/ @Meehan_MJ . Had a look at the midfield 9 role through D McBrien Mayo. Are managers today picking midfielders or midfield combinations where 8 does X and 9 does Y? I don’t see many midfield combinations anymore. 9 role crucial x.com/gaaplusofficia… 1 1 890

item.title: pgal10: paul galvin @pgal10 · 24min En respuesta a @pgal10 ….. be examined further . If 50/60/70 possessions is now deemed a gr
item.description: paul galvin @pgal10 · 24min En respuesta a @pgal10 ….. be examined further . If 50/60/70 possessions is now deemed a great individual stat , what of the 50/100/150 solos that might accompany those possessions? 245
